accurate.why: The description of the D.C. act's provisions (neck restraints, body cameras, disciplinary records) is consistent with the known content of the Comprehensive Policing and Justice Reform Amendment Act of 2022.

no_hallucinations.why: The substantive provisions described are accurate real-world context about the D.C. act; they are not in the H.J.Res. 42 bill text but are accurate facts about the underlying D.C. act.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution nullifies the D.C. policing and justice reform act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: No amendment to existing federal law in this disapproval resolution.

effective_dates.why: No specific effective date beyond enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the disapproval purpose and includes accurate context about the underlying D.C. act's content.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the D.C. Council and the act being nullified.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
